description: Annual earning limits and reduction factors for Social Security earnings test. Must go from current year to year you turn 67 (NRA).
notes: Reduction factor is the divisor: $1 reduction per $2 earned = 2, $1 reduction per $3 earned = 3

age_before_nra.description: $1 benefit reduction for every $2 in earnings above limit

age_nra_year.description: $1 benefit reduction for every $3 in earnings above limit, applies Jan 1 to month before NRA

age_nra_year.description: $1 benefit reduction for every $3 in earnings above limit, applies Jan 1 to month before NRA
